messages.content:
Describe a potential mitigation strategy for this type of vulnerability.

Cross-site request forgery (CSRF) vulnerability in Quiz And Survey Master versions prior to 7.3.7 allows a remote attacker to hijack the authentication of administrators and conduct arbitrary operations via a specially crafted web page.
To mitigate CSRF vulnerabilities, implement anti-CSRF tokens and ensure that state-changing requests are checked for these tokens to validate authenticity.
